dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity >50 words. Instructions >200 words with 5 numbered sections. Tool guidance with PostHog REST, Slack, Linear GraphQL API specs. Three examples (experiment winner, stale flag digest, flag change). Error handling with PostHog/Slack/Linear/state errors.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request mapped to PostHog REST API, Slack Web API, Linear GraphQL. file_read/write for posthog_flags_state.json. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Daily 9AM weekdays for experiment analysis + 10-min polling for flag changes. Both match corresponding prompt workflow sections.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: PostHog, Slack, Linear all have complete connector definitions with credential fields and setup instructions.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Local state file tracks flags, experiments, Linear ticket IDs, stale report history. State schema documented in tool guidance section.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: PostHog auth/rate limits/server errors, Slack channel errors with fallback, Linear auth and duplicate detection, state file corruption with backup and silent initial sync.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 use_case_flows covered: experiment results analysis and ticket creation, real-time flag change detection, stale flag hygiene and escalation.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Replaces 3 separate workflows. Statistical significance detection with actionable recommendations, prioritized Linear tickets for rollout, flag hygiene with 30/60-day escalation tiers.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Standard REST APIs. PostHog, Slack, Linear all have builtin connectors. Schedule and polling triggers are straightforward.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Statistical significance analysis (95% confidence threshold), priority based on lift magnitude (>10% urgent, 5-10% high, <5% normal), cross-referencing experiments with flags to prevent premature archival suggestions.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: Adoption questions cover project ID, channel, team key, significance threshold, stale days, and auto-create toggle. All genuinely needed.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: PostHog project ID has empty default (mandatory input). Significance threshold (0.95) and stale days (30) have good defaults. Slack channel and Linear team have reasonable defaults.

issues: No adoption_questions existed before fix - PostHog project ID, Slack channel, Linear team, thresholds all needed user-specific configuration

template: Added 6 adoption_questions: posthog_project_id, slack_product_channel, linear_team_key, significance_threshold, stale_flag_days, auto_create_linear_tickets
